name: bird-mood-nfc
description: 今日鸟签 NFC 小程序原型与 H5 预览

scripts.build: node scripts/convert_bird_webp.mjs && node scripts/export_h5_birds.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const birds=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('web/assets/meta/birds.json','utf8'));fs.writeFileSync('web/assets/meta/birds-data.js','window.BIRD_SIGN_DATA = '+JSON.stringify(birds,null,2)+';\n');" && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/assets dist/web/assets && cp index.html styles.css script.js dist/ && cp -R assets/birds-final dist/assets/ && cp -R assets/birds-final-webp dist/assets/ && if [ -d assets/bird-calls ]; then cp -R assets/bird-calls dist/assets/; fi && cp -R web/assets/meta dist/web/assets/
